title: astragalus onobrychis var. angustifolius
intro: Astragalus onobrychis var. angustifolius, also known as Astragalus angustifolius, is a perennial plant species in the legume family (Fabaceae) native to Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which can help to boost the immune system and reduce stress. The health benefits of Astragalus angustifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. Astragalus angustifolius is commonly prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures for medicinal use, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall well-being.
